reason: Agent responded correctly to the math question with the expected answer "4"
steps: Navigated to http://localhost:47891 — Application loaded successfully showing the agent list with three agents
Found and clicked "QA-20260507-205128-ac1m" agent in the sidebar — Agent page loaded with idle status
Verified agent status is "running" or "idle" — Status shows "idle" at top right, meets requirement
Typed message "Hello! What is 2+2?" in the message input field — Message was entered successfully in the textbox
Clicked the "Send message" button — Message was sent and a new chat session "Basic Math Question Session" was created
Waited for response — Agent responded almost immediately with the answer "4"
Verified response mentions "4" — Chat clearly shows the agent's response of "4" to the math question
